subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Jan. 1909
subcodes.first_line: This peace shall be unveiled after mighty commotions and momentous happenings... yea, in this very age and century wherein we now find ourselves [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این صلح بعد از انقلابات و حوادث عظیمه است که رخ می گشاید ... بلی در همین عصر و قرن که در او داخلیم
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @the Lesser Peace and the Most Great Peace, @universal peace; world unity
